name: Bad ending party | SUPER avoidable ntr
description:
An extremely avoidable (anti)NTR with multiple routes :]

Waait! Before you scroll and think "Ahhh... Another bad ending party bot released into this rotting website..." You may think it's one of those slop ntr ones? Naah. I making this alot different this shit is primarily made so i can stomp calypso on a curb. NYEHEHEHE-

Im tired of the usual NTR slop here, im taking matters into my own hands after i kept encountering bad ending party bots with no freedom to them. I like the idea of beating calypso to a pulp but it's kinda hard to maneuver Without using "(OOC)". Some of you might say, " oh emmy, why not just use ooc then???" SHUSH!... To that i say, it kinda feels weird to dictate the next action the bot will make no...? Or jus me???!

i completely hate these bad ending party bots that just sets a fixed route for you to go. Sure we have the actusl power of imagination since these are just bots but it gets annoying quick and it takes the fun out of it.

I really hate it when your shit gets defined for you, no set of freedom or whatever. Sure it may be more accurate to put that there but it just lacks the... I don't know, it lacks something. Like full control of your own persona.

Thats why im making this bot. Yeah sure this trope might of been used endless amounts of time already, but i can't seem to find one scenario where you have control of your entire persona! Anyways enough yapping and enjoy the bot. Wait, im still VERY inexperienced on bot making... Shaaaaat... This bot might be ass ngl😭

My second ever bot released into this site D: i am still so clueless to making bots. so expect some quality issues (╥ω╥`)7

And of course the art was from the infamous artist ratatatat74: #485816 i highly recommend NOT reading this funny manga.

Oh btw... I could not find ANY info about the bad ending party, i did thought of just copying from a pre existing bot but naah, steal is bad. I got no other source of info except... Thats right... I read the "funny manga" of it just to get the information to put in this bot... Though might make some stuff up just to fill in then blanks on ashe, rei or calypso and stuff like that.

I HATED IT

Anyways, yes. I suffered just to create this bot... To be honest i still got ZERO information About them... Shit, the dude in the middle don't even have a name. So... Have... Fun... =w=... As usual i highly recommend using deepseek when chatting with this bot since jllm could only handle so much. Anyways... I made this bot at 3 am so you gotts expect some mistakes here... Made this bot for an hour... Currently 4:20am at the time of publishing this... Nyehehhehe.... NyoOooo sleep gaming. Not expecting this to go viral, just want something to smash on the curb. Made this within liiek... 1-2 hours max. ... It's 4am ok... I just raw dogged this bot... I just used my depleting creativity... Im still severely inexperienced...I need sleep. As always, im hoping to hear some suggestions or even complaints if something is wrong with my bot in the comment section yipeee... thud.... snore

alsoo, make sure to check my other bots :3 i will try my best to only make high quality bots... Im Inexperienced okee? >:|

you are completely free to do whatever ya want, you can be as i said on the bio this hss multiple routes And you're only defined as rei 'n ashe's party member on the prompt... Yeah i kinda wrote it like they know NOTHING about you. Soo uh... Go wild? Oh yeah also, if you have like a persona of some sort of eldrich god of some sorts and you want them to not know, make sure you define that you bein
creator: FISH_QUEEN
